pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_sumo.sh and setup_task.sh which configure the environment and copy the scenario files to this directory.
Verified by reading export_result.sh and verifier.py which explicitly check for the presence and validity of this file.
Verified by reading export_result.sh and verifier.py which read this specific file path to extract the final answer.
Verified by reading verifier.py which requires the XML intervals to have a time difference of exactly 300 seconds.

privileged_info_summary: The environment uses the real-world SUMO Bologna Pasubio traffic scenario. Running the simulation to completion with an <edgeData> aggregation interval of 300 seconds produces an XML output. Analyzing this output by averaging the reported occupancy for each edge across all active intervals reveals the top 5 most congested edges to be: 1. 17[1] (~60.00%), 2. 39[1][1][0] (~54.03%), 3. 81 (~50.52%), 4. 4[1][1][0] (~46.88%), 5. 17[0] (~46.48%). The task verifier correctly expects the results to be saved as /home/ga/SUMO_Output/edge_meandata.xml and /home/ga/SUMO_Output/congestion_report.txt.
